target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Front end and engine compartment are completely consumed by fire; structural frame is exposed and charred; windshield and roof are missing; debris scattered around vehicle; no intact major components visible.

summary: One military equipment target assessed: DESTROYED, CONFIRMED. The scene depicts a single green Jeep Wrangler that has been completely burned out, with its front end, engine compartment, windshield, and roof destroyed, exposing charred structural components and scattered debris. The vehicle is non-functional and poses no operational threat.
